title: RxRx2 Cell Painting Compound Perturbation Dataset

data_urls.access_notes: Official page reports a complete dataset download and metadata.

instructions: Inspect metadata and use a compound/experiment-stratified slice before downloading the complete image archive.
Record experiment, plate, well, site, cell type, compound, dose, and replicate metadata.
Use image embeddings or morphology profiles for early SPECTRA passes; only pull raw images when needed.

scale.download_size: official complete image download is roughly 185GB; not a default autonomous full pull

recommended_axes.name: compound_identity_and_structure
recommended_axes.definition: Compound identity, chemical fingerprint, scaffold, or dose support.

recommended_axes.name: experiment_batch_support
recommended_axes.definition: Experiment, plate, well, replicate, and acquisition-setting similarity.

recommended_axes.name: morphology_embedding_support
recommended_axes.definition: Frozen image-encoder or Cell Painting profile similarity to training examples.

useful_for: Cell Painting generalization audits across compound, dose, replicate, and batch.
Follow-up to BBBC021 and RxRx1 when larger compound-perturbation scale is needed.
Testing whether image models learn compound biology or experiment-specific morphology artifacts.
leakage_risks: Replicates, wells, and fields can leak image-acquisition context across splits.
Compound identity, dose, and batch can be confounded.
Large raw image archive can overrun storage if downloaded by default.

paperclip_provenance.notes: Paperclip extraction from DeepPaint identified RxRx2 as a high-content Cell Painting dataset with replicate-experiment variation and direct official data access.
